creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
ecamegapedal is no longer maintened since 2004 and changes was made in the ecasound's API who prevents this port to be compiled.

As the author of ecamegapedal focuses his attention in ecasound developement only, and suggest users to move to new audio applications, this project can be considered as dead.

I suggest the port removal

See website for details.
http://ecasound.sourceforge.net/ecamegapedal/
